allowed_claims_register.claim_text: In the current safe abstract toy model, the memory-ledger component produces the clearest measurable divergence from baseline behavior.
The current safe toy audit does not falsify the memory-ledger stability effect within the tested toy configuration.

allowed_claims_register.basis: Only VF-H2 is not-falsified while VF-H1, VF-H3, and VF-H4 are falsified-or-unresolved.
allowed_claims_register.claim_text: The current safe toy evidence supports reducing the defensible toy core to memory-ledger-driven toy dynamics.

allowed_claims_register.basis: VF-H1, VF-H3, and VF-H4 each have selected_delta_total 0.0.
allowed_claims_register.claim_text: The multi-layer constraint, causal-mass, and three-time-layer mechanisms remain unresolved or unsupported in the current safe toy audit.

allowed_claims_register.basis: Current evidence is toy-only and narrow, with readiness denied in v9.5.
allowed_claims_register.claim_text: The full Viruse Fabric theory should be treated as a broader framework, not as a validated theory.

forbidden_claims_register.forbidden_claim: The full Viruse Fabric theory is validated.
forbidden_claims_register.reason: Only safe toy evidence exists, and only VF-H2 is not-falsified in the current audit.
VF-H3 has selected_delta_total 0.0 and is falsified-or-unresolved in this safe toy audit.
VF-H4 has selected_delta_total 0.0 and is falsified-or-unresolved in this safe toy audit.

forbidden_claims_register.forbidden_claim: The multi-layer constraint path-shift mechanism is supported.
forbidden_claims_register.reason: VF-H1 has selected_delta_total 0.0 and is falsified-or-unresolved in this safe toy audit.

forbidden_claims_register.forbidden_claim: The project is manuscript submission ready.
forbidden_claims_register.reason: v9.5 readiness gate decision is not_ready_for_manuscript_submission.

forbidden_claims_register.forbidden_claim: The toy audit is empirical evidence.
forbidden_claims_register.reason: The audit is safe abstract toy only and has no external validation or independent experiment.

forbidden_claims_register.forbidden_claim: The model applies to real biological systems.
forbidden_claims_register.reason: No real biological datasets, pathogen models, receptor parameters, or operational biological assumptions are introduced.

forbidden_claims_register.forbidden_claim: The current outputs justify manuscript mutation or citation integration.
forbidden_claims_register.reason: No manuscript mutation or citation integration is authorized in v9.6.

non_validation_disclaimer: Safe toy scientific yield extraction and theory reduction only. No validation claim is made. No manuscript readiness claim is made. No readiness approval is recorded. No manuscript file is modified. No citation is added. No external validation is performed. No independent experiment is performed. No real biological datasets, no real pathogen models, no receptor parameters, no operational targeting, no wet-lab protocol, no infectivity optimization, no immune evasion optimization, and no host range prediction are introduced.

reduced_theory_core.boundary: Safe abstract toy reduction only. This is not empirical evidence, not external validation, not independent validation, not manuscript readiness, and not a theory validation claim.
reduced_theory_core.core_statement: The currently defensible toy-supported core of Viruse Fabric is memory-ledger-driven toy dynamics. The broader theory remains a framework, not a validated theory.

scientific_yield_summary.summary_statement: The v9.4 safe toy audit yields a narrow signal centered on the memory ledger. Only VF-H2 is not-falsified in the current safe toy audit. VF-H1, VF-H3, and VF-H4 remain unresolved or unsupported. v9.5 denies manuscript submission readiness.

title: Viruse Fabric Safe Toy Scientific Yield Extraction and Theory Reduction
